title: GM follows Ford by making a big energy bet — this time with an unconventional approach
summary: GM plans to revamp its energy business and place a big bet on sodium-ion batteries just as shares of rival Ford got a boost from a similar move a few weeks ago.
title_en: GM follows Ford by making a big energy bet — this time with an unconventional approach
summary_en: GM plans to revamp its energy business and place a big bet on sodium-ion batteries just as shares of rival Ford got a boost from a similar move a few weeks ago.
title_zh: 通用汽車效仿福特，在能源領域下了大賭注——這次採用了非常規的方法
summary_zh: 通用汽車計劃重組其能源業務，並在鈉離子電池上投入大筆資金，而幾週前競爭對手福特的股價也因類似舉措而得到提振。

title: Angst over SpaceX IPO adds to dive in tech stocks
summary: Technology stocks tumbled on Tuesday, extending a swoon that began in early June, as investors anxiously await the historic SpaceX IPO later this week and retreat from hot parts of the AI playbook.
title_en: Angst over SpaceX IPO adds to dive in tech stocks
summary_en: Technology stocks tumbled on Tuesday, extending a swoon that began in early June, as investors anxiously await the historic SpaceX IPO later this week and retreat from hot parts of the AI playbook.
title_zh: 對 SpaceX IPO 的擔憂加劇了科技股的跳水
summary_zh: 科技股週二暴跌，延續了 6 月初開始的頹勢，投資者焦急地等待本週晚些時候歷史性的 SpaceX 首次公開募股，並從人工智慧領域的熱門部分撤退。

title: Social Security Benefits Could Be Cut in 6 Years Unless Congress Acts
summary: The trust fund for the program, which supports roughly 68 million Americans, is on schedule to be depleted in the next six years. Benefits could be cut on average by 22 percent.
title_en: Social Security Benefits Could Be Cut in 6 Years Unless Congress Acts
summary_en: The trust fund for the program, which supports roughly 68 million Americans, is on schedule to be depleted in the next six years. Benefits could be cut on average by 22 percent.
title_zh: 除非國會採取行動，否則社會安全福利可能在六年內削減
summary_zh: 該計劃的信託基金支持約 6,800 萬美國人，預計將在未來六年內耗盡。福利可能平均減少 22%。

Should You Buy Ford While It's Below $10?
summary:
Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) just reported financial results for the three-month period that ended Dec. 31. Revenue rose 5% to $48.2 billion, with adjusted diluted earnings per share increasing 34%. These headline figures came in ahead of Wall Street analyst estimates, which is an encouraging sign.

Nonetheless, the auto stock dropped following the announcement. Shares were trading well below $10 on the morning of Feb. 10. Does this mean you should buy Ford?

The market is forward-looking. Therefore, investors probably weren't happy with Ford's guidance for 2025. The business expects to generate $7 billion to $8.5 billion of adjusted operating income this year, which would represent a decline from $10.2 billion in 2024. What's more, the leadership team believes industry pricing will come down 2% this year, creating a headwind.

Continue reading
